name: io.github.feedoracle/feedoracle-mcp
description: DORA Operating System and compliance evidence infrastructure for regulated financial entities. 11 MCP servers with 203 tools covering MiCA authorization (PASS/WARN/BLOCK), DORA readiness across all 26 articles, stablecoin risk scoring (105+ tokens), macro intelligence (86 FRED series), AML screening, contract analysis, and incident reporting. Closed-loop finding management with automated escalation. Every response ES256K-signed and blockchain-anchored (Polygon + XRPL). Free tier available.
